data.current_description: Create a new property along with its units.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new property with associated units
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new property record along with its associated units in the Showdigs platform. Accepts property details and unit information in the request body. Returns the created property object with assigned property ID and unit records. This operation establishes the foundational property record required for listing and showing management.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved version clarifies: (1) what data is expected in the request (property details and units), (2) what is returned (property object with ID and units), and (3) the operational context (foundational record for listings/showings). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'updateProperty' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and update behavior. This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

data.current_description: Update an existing property and its units by origin ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Update property and associated units by ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing property record and its associated units using the property's origin ID as the identifier. Accepts updated property details and unit information in the request body. Returns the updated property object with modified fields and unit records. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Requires the property to exist in the system.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and update behavior. The improved version clarifies: (1) the identifier used (origin_id parameter), (2) what data is accepted (property details and units), (3) what is returned (updated property object), (4) update semantics (partial updates supported), and (5) preconditions (property must exist). This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

message: Operation 'deactivateListing' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal. It lacks clarity about what deactivation means (removal from availability), what the response contains, and the side effects (listing becomes unavailable). data.current_description: Deactivate a specific listing by UUID.
data.description_suggestion: Deactivates a specific listing by UUID, removing it from active availability. The listing will no longer appear in search results or be available for showings. Returns a success response confirming the deactivation. This operation is permanent unless the listing is reactivated.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks clarity about what deactivation means (removal from availability), what the response contains, and the side effects (listing becomes unavailable). Added context about search visibility and permanence to help AI agents understand the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Register a webhook URL to receive event notifications. URL must use HTTPS.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive event notifications from the Showdigs platform. Accepts a WebhookSubscribeRequest with the webhook URL (must use HTTPS) and event types to subscribe to. Returns a subscription confirmation with a webhook ID and secret for signature verification. Once registered, the webhook will receive POST requests for subscribed events.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions HTTPS requirement but lacks input/output details and side effects. Added information about WebhookSubscribeRequest structure, response contents (subscription ID and secret), and the side effect (webhook will receive POST requests). data.current_description: Remove the registered webhook subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a registered webhook subscription by webhook ID. Accepts the webhook ID as a parameter. Returns a success response confirming the unsubscription. Once removed, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications from the platform.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague about inputs and side effects. data.current_description: Create a new property along with its units.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new property with associated units
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new property record along with its associated units in the Showdigs platform. Accepts property details and unit information in the request body. Returns the created property object with assigned property ID and unit records. This operation establishes the foundational property record required for listing and showing management.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved version clarifies: (1) what data is expected in the request (property details and units), (2) what is returned (property object with ID and units), and (3) the operational context (foundational record for listings/showings). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'updateProperty' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and update behavior. This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

data.current_description: Update an existing property and its units by origin ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Update property and associated units by ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing property record and its associated units using the property's origin ID as the identifier. Accepts updated property details and unit information in the request body. Returns the updated property object with modified fields and unit records. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Requires the property to exist in the system.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and update behavior. The improved version clarifies: (1) the identifier used (origin_id parameter), (2) what data is accepted (property details and units), (3) what is returned (updated property object), (4) update semantics (partial updates supported), and (5) preconditions (property must exist). This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

message: Operation 'deactivateListing' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal. It lacks clarity about what deactivation means (removal from availability), what the response contains, and the side effects (listing becomes unavailable). Added context about search visibility and permanence to help AI agents understand the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Deactivate a specific listing by UUID.
data.description_suggestion: Deactivates a specific listing by UUID, removing it from active availability. The listing will no longer appear in search results or be available for showings. Returns a success response confirming the deactivation. This operation is permanent unless the listing is reactivated.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks clarity about what deactivation means (removal from availability), what the response contains, and the side effects (listing becomes unavailable). Added context about search visibility and permanence to help AI agents understand the operation's impact.

Returns a CreateInquiryResponse containing the inquiry ID and confirmation details. The inquiry is immediately available for property managers to review.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks input and output details. Missing output details (subscription ID, secret) and side effects (immediate activation, event delivery). Added information about response content and the immediate activation state. data.current_description: Register a webhook URL to receive event notifications. URL must use HTTPS.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive event notifications from the Showdigs platform. Accepts a WebhookSubscribeRequest with the webhook URL (must use HTTPS) and event types to subscribe to. Returns a subscription confirmation with a webhook ID and secret for signature verification. The webhook becomes active immediately and will receive events matching the subscription criteria.
data.reasoning: Missing output details (subscription ID, secret) and side effects (immediate activation, event delivery). Added information about response content and the immediate activation state. This helps AI agents understand what to expect after subscription and how to verify webhook authenticity.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. This helps AI agents understand the complete lifecycle of webhook management.

data.current_description: Remove the registered webhook subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Removes an active webhook subscription by webhook ID, stopping all event notifications to that URL. Requires the webhook ID obtained during subscription. Returns a success response confirming the unsubscription. No further events will be delivered to the webhook URL after this operation completes.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks input details (webhook ID required) and side effects (stops event delivery). Added clarity about what parameter is needed and the immediate cessation of event delivery. This helps AI agents understand the complete lifecycle of webhook management.
